line: function clamp(value: Float, low: Float, high: Float): Float =
if (value < low) low else if (value > high) high else value
function castReading(value: unknown): Number = value as Number
function pipeline(value: Int): Int = value |> (it -> it + 1)
escaped = "quote \" slash \\ newline\n tab\t return\r λ=\u{03bb} \(title)"
